---
title: "Exploratory Analysis"
format: html
cache: true
---

## Setup

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(fixest)
library(bgi)
```

## Data Loading

```{r load-data}
# Example: Load data using here() for paths
# df <- read_csv(here("data", "my_data.csv")) %>%
#   clean_names()
```

## Data Exploration

```{r explore-summary}
# Example: Summarize with explicit column selection
# df %>%
#   select(id, date, category, value) %>%
#   summary()
```

```{r explore-distribution}
# Example: Named figure chunk for the figure manifest
# df %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
#   geom_histogram(bins = 50) +
#   labs(title = "Distribution of values")
#
# ggsave(here("_site", "figures", "value_distribution.png"))
```

## Analysis

```{r model-baseline}
# Example: fixest regression
# model <- feols(outcome ~ treatment | fixed_effects, data = df)
# summary(model)
```

## Results

```{r results-table}
# Example: Results summary
# modelsummary::modelsummary(model)
```
